title: Silver Crucible
description: The first [blue]3[/blue] card rewards you see are [gold]Upgraded[/gold]. The first Treasure Chest you open is [red]empty[/red].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: This relic becomes Disabled after upgrading 3 card rewards and entering 1 Treasure Chest room.
